parents.subject: LU-16344 docs: Improve explaination in manual of lfs-getstripe

commit.subject: LU-14108 tests: mount with discovery and network
commit.message:
LU-14108 tests: mount with discovery and network

The added test checks we cannot mount an MDT/OST with network option
if discovery is enabled.

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=conf-sanity
Signed-off-by: Cyril Bordage <cbordage@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I2821a22d24c25f4529f0cfbd563c8da61a20e822
